name: ci-test-runner-daily
description: CI-only virtual project. Runs `yarn task test-runner` for react-vite/default-ts on daily runs only. Mirrors the CircleCI daily first-template test-runner extra (scripts/ci/sandboxes.ts defineSandboxTestRunner). Uses the distinct target name `daily-test-runner` so it doesn't collide with per-sandbox `test-runner` (which is kept for local `yarn nx test-runner <sandbox>` use).
